name: cybozu-style-ppt
description: Create cybozu/kintone-inspired PowerPoint decks with editable Route A production and image-first Route B visual-story production.

interface.shortDescription: Create cybozu/kintone-style PPT decks with editable and image-first routes.
interface.longDescription: Cybozu Style PPT helps produce presentation decks that borrow cybozu/kintone visual language. It defines a shared Text Lock process, an editable Route A for business-document decks, and an image-first Route B for full-slide visual-story decks packaged as non-editable PPTX image containers with speaker notes.
defaultPrompt: Create a cybozu/kintone-style editable proposal deck.
Make a Route B image-first visual-story deck.
Turn this kintone topic into a presentation.
